title: Tanz der Zuckerfee
overview: Jan has been familiar with cannabis and alcohol for a long time, but he cannot resist the new, sweet-tasting temptation with its shimmering smoke. It takes him into a new world of possibilities. Jan develops a serious addiction and an insatiable craving for more. In a frenzy, Jan is swept away into a cosmos of lies, where he experiences both wonderful and overwhelming things, and from which he suddenly can no longer escape. Everything seems to be turning out well, but is it really as simple as it seems? Seemingly incidentally, we experience Jan's conflict between his girlfriend Emilia and his affair with Alexa. A minor issue develops into the central plot line. Inspired by real events, this fictional story, which is not so far removed from reality for many, shows how quickly temptation can become too great and how deep the fall can be.
